footer.taglineSuffix: manage academics, finance, staff, and parent communication from one platform.

home.heroSubtitle: A fast, intuitive platform to manage your entire school—from national curriculum grading to mobile money fee collection.
home.heroSubtitleExtra: No enterprise contracts. No setup fees. Real support when you need it.
home.trustSimpleDesc: Live in a day—not months of training
home.trustSupportDesc: WhatsApp and email from a team that answers
home.trustAffordableDesc: No setup fees. No lock-in. Plans that fit your school
home.audienceIntro: One platform for school managers, teachers, parents, and students.
home.connectivitySubtitle: Use ShuleOS on phone, tablet, or computer. Install it like an app for quick access—even when the connection is slow.
home.connectivityFeature1: Works on any device—no special hardware required
home.connectivityFeature2: Install on your home screen for one-tap access
home.connectivityFeature3: Offline-ready for attendance and cached pages
home.pwaInstallImageAlt: Teacher installing ShuleOS on a smartphone
home.pwaInstallNowHint: Add ShuleOS to this device in one tap
home.pwaInstallBrowserHint: Open on Chrome or Edge, then use the browser install option
home.pwaInstallIosHint: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen
home.pwaInstalledHint: ShuleOS is ready on this device
home.rolesSectionSubtitle: Tailored experiences for every stakeholder—managers, teachers, parents, and students.
home.modulesSectionSubtitle: A comprehensive toolkit aligned with the DRC national curriculum and the way schools run day to day.
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Join schools across the DRC choosing a local platform—fair pricing, human support, and everything in one place with {productName}.
home.finalCtaHighlight1: No setup fees or long-term contracts
home.finalCtaHighlight3: WhatsApp support from a real team
home.adminTitle: Run your entire school from one place
home.adminDescription: Get a comprehensive overview of your school - finances, attendance, student performance, and staff - all in one dashboard.
home.adminFeature1: Manage students, classes, admissions, and staff from a single academic dashboard
home.adminFeature2: Track fees, invoices, payments, and payroll with built-in financial reports
home.adminFeature3: Launch branded school websites with online admissions and role-based access
home.teacherTitle: Spend less time on admin, more on teaching
home.teacherDescription: Take attendance, enter grades, create assignments, and generate report cards - all from your dashboard.
home.teacherFeature1: Take daily attendance and enter grades in a class gradebook
home.teacherFeature2: Create assignments with file uploads, run exams, and print report cards
home.teacherFeature3: Message students and parents directly from your teacher dashboard
home.parentDescription: Parents track grades, fees, timetables, and assignments in real time. Students submit work from any device.
home.parentFeature1: View grades, attendance, timetables, and school events in real time
home.parentFeature2: Pay fees instantly via mobile money or smart payment links with the exact amount pre-filled
home.parentFeature3: Submit assignments, browse the library, and message teachers from any device

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run a modern school
features.heroSubtitle: A visual outline of every functionality in the {productName} platform. All modules are fully integrated and designed for DRC schools—national curriculum workflows, local fee structures, mobile money, and parent communication that works on WhatsApp. Simple to adopt. Supported by a real team.
features.ctaTitle: Ready to see it in action?
features.ctaSubtitle: Get personalized access for your school and explore all features in a live environment.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Whether you're onboarding a new school in the DRC or need help with an existing account, our team is here to help.
contact.legalNote: For legal or privacy matters, see our

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Guides and resources to help you get the most out of the platform.
docs.gettingStartedDesc: Create your school account, complete onboarding, and invite your first users.
docs.academicModuleDesc: Set up classes, timetables, attendance, grades, and report cards.
docs.financeModuleDesc: Configure fee structures, send invoices, and collect payments via mobile money.
docs.parentPortalDesc: Help parents track fees, grades, timetables, and school events.
docs.securityModuleDesc: Learn how we protect your school's data and comply with privacy standards.

getAccess.heroSubtitle: No setup fees. No long contracts. A complete digital ecosystem for your school—built for DRC schools, national curriculum programmes, and fair local pricing.
getAccess.mobilePreviewAlt: {productName} mobile app preview — academics, mobile money payments, and parent communication
getAccess.journeySubtitle: Simple, guided steps to get your school online.
getAccess.step1Desc: Create your school account with your name and admin email, or continue with Google. Takes 60 seconds.
getAccess.step2Desc: A guided 4-step wizard walks you through domain, colors, and your public site template.
getAccess.step3Desc: Add teachers, finance officers, and other admins — each gets a role-specific dashboard.
getAccess.step4Desc: Your school portal and public website are ready. Parents and students can start using it today.
getAccess.includedSubtitle: One platform, all the tools your school needs from day one.
getAccess.included5: School public website with online admissions
